steps.explanation: Convert the area unit first. Since $1 \text{ m} = 3.28 \text{ ft}$, squaring both sides gives $1 \text{ m}^2 = (3.28)^2 \text{ ft}^2 = 10.7584 \text{ ft}^2$.
Convert from per hour to per minute by dividing by 60: $$\frac{26.01}{60} \approx 0.433 \text{ m}^2/\text{min}$$

• Choice A: 0.43 — matches $0.433$ rounded. That confirms A is correct.
  • Choice B: 1.42 — does not match. Eliminated.
  • Choice C: 15.31 — does not match. Eliminated.
  • Choice D: 26.03 — this is the rate in $\text{m}^2/\text{hr}$, not per minute. Eliminated.
